confirmation.detail: inbox envelope env_a44641fa-a8a7-4686-9bd3-cb48c630f8e9 read back as received

evidence: task review 62 --verdict accepted_with_notes returned review_verdict_status accepted but lifecycle_status and new_status stayed in_review.
task close 62 then failed: Latest Evidence Admission result is rejected.
task continue 62 failed because only claimed and needs_continuation tasks support continuation, not in_review.
Architect had to record a new rejected review to reopen the task for evidence repair, despite implementation review being accepted.
proposal: Define a sanctioned transition for accepted implementation review with evidence-repair-needed, such as needs_continuation or evidence_repair, instead of leaving task in in_review dead-end.
When task close reports remediation such as missing Execution Notes, provide the exact sanctioned command to return task to Builder or amend evidence.
task review accepted after a previous rejection should not leave latest evidence admission rejected without a continuation path.
Add tests for rejected -> fixed -> accepted_with_notes -> close and rejected -> fixed -> evidence repair needed flows.
payload.recommendation: Treat as CAPA for task lifecycle review/evidence admission state machine ergonomics and correctness.
payload.summary: Task 62 implementation re-review accepted commit 21dac9e, but task close failed because latest evidence admission remained rejected. task continue also refused because status was in_review. This created a lifecycle dead-end requiring another rejection solely to return the task to Builder for evidence repair.
payload.title: CAPA: Accepted re-review left task in uncloseable in_review state
